title: Nathan  Fournier
content:
People.ContactEmail nfournier@mccarthy.ca
Nathan Fournier is an associate in McCarthy Tétrault’s Labour and Employment Group in Calgary. He has a broad legal practice which includes supporting clients with all aspects of labour and employment matters. Nathan has represented clients before the Alberta Court of Justice and the Court of King’s Bench of Alberta.
Nathan earned his Juris Doctor from the University of Alberta Faculty of Law. He also holds a Bachelor of Commerce from MacEwan University. While in law school, Nathan completed a year-long clerkship with the Alberta Court of Justice, volunteered with Student Legal Services, and served as Treasurer for the Mental Health and Wellness Committee.
Admitted to the Alberta Bar in 2024, Nathan is a member of the Law Society of Alberta, the Calgary Bar Association, and the Advocates’ Society.
Outside the office, Nathan volunteers with Big Brothers Big Sisters of Calgary and enjoys visiting dog parks with his dog Remington.
